track: A1b — novelty-leg DECISION ablation (fusion vs calibration-alone)
question: Does the COMMITTED gate (conformal trust FUSED with orthogonal genetic/eQTL evidence) make GO calls better supported by HELD-OUT orthogonal evidence than a SELF-CONCORDANT trust-ONLY rule (PRESCRIBE-analog)?
honesty_contract: Referee + rule definitions hash-frozen BEFORE any concordance metric computed. Real committed gate reproduced (commit_gate.evaluate logic), NOT a surrogate. Trust from committed pooled-proxy trust.py path. Null (fusion adds little) is a valid publishable outcome.

referee_HELD_OUT_orthogonal_evidence.chosen: y_mouse_immune (mouse-KO IMMUNE/hematopoietic phenotype, IMPC/MGI via Open Targets)
referee_HELD_OUT_orthogonal_evidence.why: Rule was constructed WITHOUT mouse phenotype data (built from curated immune-GO + OT human assoc + GWAS tag + Treg direction + human eQTL). Mouse germline/conditional KO is an orthogonal model system -> the validation CAN fail. Cleanest available held-out referee.
rejected_alternatives: drug-target tier (entangled with OT assoc used by gate)
coloc (overlaps eQTL evidence used by gate)

rule_i_COMMITTED_fusion.def: GO iff GA(OT T1D)>=0.20 AND eqtl_nsig>0 AND trust>=0.50 (leakage-clean, direction-not-inconsistent by construction) — commit_gate.evaluate logic

rule_ii_SELF_CONCORDANT_trust_only.literal_def: GO iff trust>=0.50 (committed MIN_TRUST_SCORE). NOTE: trust floor is NON-BINDING at scale (all 98 universe genes trust in [0.71,0.99]) -> literal rule = GO all. Documented, not tuned.
rule_ii_SELF_CONCORDANT_trust_only.matched_budget_def: GO = top-11 genes by trust (k matched to committed-gate GO count) — fair equal-budget PRESCRIBE-analog head-to-head

metrics_FROZEN.primary: precision of GO calls against y_mouse_immune = P(y_immune=1 | GO). Higher = GO calls better supported by held-out evidence.
metrics_FROZEN.small_n_caveat: n=22 overlap, 9 positives -> pilot; report CI/exact test, no general claim.

decision_rule_FROZEN.fusion_adds_value=yes: committed precision > matched-trust-only precision by >=0.15 AND divergence>0
decision_rule_FROZEN.fusion_adds_value=marginal: committed precision > trust-only but <0.15, or ties broken by secondary
decision_rule_FROZEN.fusion_adds_value=no: committed precision <= matched-trust-only precision (calibration alone is as good) — HONEST NULL, publishable
